settings.enable_readmore: Read more preview on profile page
settings.enable_readmore_help: Hides long posts on profile pages and adds a button to expand them
settings.enable_pagination: Add page navigation below the scroll bar
settings.enable_pagination_help: Keeps the discussion scrubber visible and adds a page picker below it
settings.enable_counter_help: Adds a character counter to the top-right corner of the message input
settings.enable_discussion_pager: Show page navigation instead of scroll bar
settings.enable_discussion_pager_help: Removes the discussion scrubber, adds page navigation above and below the page and disables auto-scrolling
